arts.ttl: Gouiri can become a top striker in Europe with more belief says Marseille coach De Zerbi
arts.sum: Gouiri scored two outstanding goals and played a part in the other three when Marseille routed Saint-Etienne 5-1 in Ligue 1 last Saturday. Gouiri also has three assists in the three games he’s played since joining from Rennes for 22 million euros ($23 million) in the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Roberto De Zerbi says loss against Auxerre was ‘turning point’ in Marseille’s season
arts.sum: Ahead of this weekend’s Ligue 1 clash against AJ Auxerre, Olympique de Marseille manager Roberto De Zerbi evoked Les Phocéens‘ earlier loss this season against Les Diplomates at the Vélodrome…

arts.ttl: ‘The fact a VAR operator is a PSG supporter made me angry’ – Roberto De Zerbi reacts to VAR allegations
arts.sum: Another week in Marseille, and the subject of refereeing and VAR has been on the lips of supporters and those associated with Olympique de Marseille once more. The club published…

arts.ttl: Barcelona ‘have entered the race’ for Marseille star
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have this week been credited with an interest in the signature of Olympique Marseille star Mason Greenwood. That’s according to European transfer insider Fabrizio Romano, who…
